rows.owner_action: Correct or remove the value before using it in audit evidence, device metadata, or policy documentation.
rows.acceptance_check: The replacement value matches numeric OID syntax and re-runs without an invalid_value finding.
rows.publishable_boundary: Sanitized finding only; do not attach raw client inventory or copied OID-base page bodies.

rows.issue: Valid OID without public directory evidence
rows.evidence: No exact OID-base sitemap or public PEN mapping
rows.owner_action: Check internal registry notes or another authoritative source before relying on this OID externally.
rows.acceptance_check: A source link, internal registry reference, or explicit unresolved disposition is attached.
rows.publishable_boundary: Sanitized finding only; do not attach raw client inventory or copied OID-base page bodies.

rows.owner_action: Attach the public enterprise owner mapping and confirm the sub-arc meaning with vendor or internal docs.
rows.acceptance_check: The asset record includes enterprise owner, enterprise root, and local sub-arc purpose.
rows.publishable_boundary: Sanitized finding only; do not attach raw client inventory or copied OID-base page bodies.

rows.owner_action: Preserve the source URL with the asset record and verify the business meaning with the owning team.
rows.acceptance_check: The asset record includes the OID-base source URL and an internal owner.
rows.publishable_boundary: Sanitized finding only; do not attach raw client inventory or copied OID-base page bodies.
